title: calceolaria filiformis
intro: Calceolaria filiformis, also known as the slippers or pocket-book flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calceolariaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calceolaria filiformis include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Calceolaria filiformis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
